title: Extracting Dates from a String
scenario: Write a prompt to extract dates in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD' from a given string.
constraints: Must be under 50 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated Python function must meet all the specified constraints.
The generated Python function should be syntactically correct.
The generated Python function should correctly extract dates in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
